description: Build AI Startup Idea Generator - generate wild but plausible startup ideas with fake pitch decks, valuations, investor feedback, and team suggestions. People love sharing absurd startup concepts on social media.
steps: Create directory viral-ai-saas/ai-startup-idea-generator/ with standard structure: server.js, package.json, db/, routes/, views/, public/css/, public/js/, tests/, README.md, .gitignore
Create package.json with dependencies: express, ejs, better-sqlite3, bcrypt, express-session

Create db/schema.sql with tables: users (id, email, password_hash, created_at), ideas (id, user_id nullable, industry, vibe, startup_name, tagline, description, valuation, investor_feedback, team_roles JSON text, market_size, absurdity_score, viability_score, share_id unique, created_at)
Create routes/auth.js with standard auth routes

Create routes/idea.js with: POST /idea/generate (accepts optional industry preference and 'vibe' like serious/absurd/moonshot, generates mock startup idea with name, tagline, elevator pitch, fake valuation, mock investor quotes, suggested team roles, market size estimate), GET /idea/:shareId (public shareable startup idea card)

The mock startup generator should combine random industry verticals (e.g., 'AI + Pets', 'Blockchain + Grandmas', 'AR + Plumbing') to create funny but plausible startup concepts. Include: Startup Name (creative portmanteau), One-line tagline, 2-paragraph elevator pitch, Fake valuation ($X million Series A), 3 mock investor quotes (mix of enthusiastic and skeptical), Suggested founding team (4 absurd C-suite titles), Total Addressable Market estimate.

Create views/index.ejs - startup/VC-inspired landing page with industry selector, vibe toggle (serious/absurd/moonshot), prominent generate button, showcase of example generated ideas, Silicon Valley aesthetic with clean white design and accent colors

Create views/result.ejs - startup idea presented as a mini pitch deck: company name and logo placeholder, tagline, elevator pitch section, valuation in big bold numbers, investor quotes in card format, team section with role cards, market size visualization. Share buttons.
Create views/share.ejs - public shareable startup card that looks like a condensed pitch deck slide, with CTA to generate your own
Create public/css/style.css with clean startup/VC aesthetic - white backgrounds, bold typography, accent colors, card-based layout, professional but playful
Create public/js/app.js with industry/vibe selection, form submission, share functionality, copy-to-clipboard for elevator pitch
Create tests/app.test.js with tests: server startup, landing page, auth flow, idea generation (with industry, without industry, different vibes), share page, valuation format validation, history
acceptance_criteria: Landing page renders with industry selector and vibe toggle
Generating returns a full startup idea with name, tagline, pitch, valuation, investor quotes, team
Different vibes produce appropriately toned results
